weapon.name: Anti-Armor
weapon.effect: Ignores a percentage of target's armor

weapon.name: Executioner's
weapon.effect: 50% more damage when target is below 40% health

weapon.name: Gourmand's
weapon.effect: Damage bonus based on food/water satisfaction

weapon.name: Two Shot
weapon.effect: Fires additional projectile at reduced damage

weapon.name: Stalker's (Accuracy Not In Combat)
weapon.effect: Increased accuracy when not in combat

weapon.name: Last Shot
weapon.effect: Last round in magazine does bonus damage

weapon.name: Electricians
weapon.effect: Adds energy damage scaling with base damage

weapon.name: Reload/Melee Speed Per Kill
weapon.effect: Reload or swing speed increases per kill

armor.name: Aristocrat's
armor.effect: Damage and Energy Resistance scale with caps

armor.name: Bolstering
armor.effect: Damage Resistance increases as health decreases

armor.name: Cloaking
armor.effect: Stealth field when hit in melee

armor.name: Auto-Stim
armor.effect: Auto-use Stimpak when health drops below 25%

armor.name: Ghoul Slayer's
armor.effect: Reduces damage from ghouls by 15% per piece

armor.name: Hunter's
armor.effect: Reduces damage from animals by 15% per piece

armor.name: Troubleshooter's
armor.effect: Reduces damage from robots by 15% per piece

armor.name: Zealot's
armor.effect: Reduces damage from Scorched by 15% per piece

armor.name: Assassin's
armor.effect: Reduces damage from players by 15% per piece

armor.name: Exterminator's
armor.effect: Reduces damage from bugs by 15% per piece

armor.name: Mutant Slayer's
armor.effect: Reduces damage from Super Mutants by 15% per piece

armor.name: Life Saving
armor.effect: 50% chance to auto-revive with Stimpak when downed

armor.name: Regenerating
armor.effect: Slowly regenerate HP when not in combat

armor.name: Unyielding
armor.effect: Up to +3 to all SPECIAL stats (except END) when low health

armor.name: Vanguard's
armor.effect: Damage Resistance increases with higher health

armor.name: Nocturnal
armor.effect: DR/ER increases at night, decreases during day

armor.name: Overeater's
armor.effect: Damage reduction increases with higher food/water

armor.name: Heavyweight
armor.effect: Damage Resistance scales with carried weight

armor.name: Lucid
armor.effect: Damage Resistance scales with rads taken

armor.name: Bolstering (Inverse Health DR)
armor.effect: DR increases as health decreases (flat DR version)

armor.name: Vanguard's (Proportional Health)
armor.effect: DR scales proportionally with current health

armor.name: Damage Resist via Caps
armor.effect: Direct damage resistance scaling with caps (separate from Aristocrat's)

armor.name: Food/Drink/Chem Weight Reduction
armor.effect: Food, drink, and chem weights reduced by 20%

armor.name: Less Damage Sprinting
armor.effect: Reduces damage while sprinting (different from Cavalier)

armor.name: Less Damage Standing Still
armor.effect: Reduces damage while standing still (backing for Sentinel)

armor.name: Aegis
armor.effect: Incoming damage reduction scales per piece count

armor.name: Rejuvenator's
armor.effect: Regeneration scaling per team member count
